summary: Frontend-only iteration 4 SRE dashboard polish testing — all 12 listed features verified end-to-end via Playwright on the public preview URL. 39/40 sub-assertions pass; the single miss is a case-sensitivity issue in the test (body uses 'Multi-stage' capitalised, requirement spec lists 'multi-stage') — functional requirement IS satisfied.
critical_code_review_comments: BarRow testid generation uses .replace(/[^a-z]/g, '-') which produces THREE dashes between tokens when source has ' & ' (e.g. 'bar-kubernetes---docker', 'bar-aws---terraform'). Review request listed two-dash variants (bar-kubernetes--docker etc.). Not a blocker — review explicitly says 'At minimum, verify Core Stack section contains the text', and all required text + 4 bar rows render correctly. Recommend collapsing consecutive dashes via .replace(/-+/g, '-') if exact testids matter for future automation.
Minor: pill-simulate-outage streams at 22ms/line so block-simulate-outage takes ~2.5s to fully complete — testing accounts for this.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 1-4 features confirmed working. Public URL: https://sre-agent.preview.emergentagent.com. Key verified: left header '📁 INFRASTRUCTURE REPOSITORY'; center-header '📟 LIVE SRE TERMINAL (type /help)'; right header '📊 CLUSTER METRICS & PROFILE'; data-testid='system-active' contains 'SYSTEM: ACTIVE' with pulsing green dot next to 'Junior DevOps / SRE Engineer'; Core Stack has 4 emoji-block bars (Kubernetes & Docker 90% green, AWS & Terraform 80% blue, Python/Bash/CI-CD 85% amber, Monitoring 80% purple); quick-pills row with 4 pills all wire to correct slash commands; /simulate-outage stream contains CrashLoopBackOff, Root cause, '✓ Resolved in 4m 23s'; /projects intro mentions itomata_cicd_project + proshop-v2 and both top cards present; projects/itomata-cicd.md body has 'AWS EKS', 'Terraform', 'AI-assisted', 'GitHub Actions'; projects/proshop-v2.md body has 'Multi-stage' (capitalised) + 'distroless'; /summary has 'Executive Summary' + 'CI/CD' + 'Terraform' + 'monitoring'; /recruiter mentions both featured projects; /runbooks intro mentions 'Interactive debugging' and 7 rows + click-to-open works; /help has 16 commands incl. /simulate-outage as cmd-link; typo /pro suggests /projects; /clear resets to welcome. Bar testids use three consecutive dashes (bar-kubernetes---docker) because of ' & ' separator in labels — note for any future selector-based tests.
